## CommonVersionsConfiguration.saveAsync() method

Writes the "common-versions.json" file to disk, using the filename that was passed to loadFromFile().

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsync(): Promise<boolean>;
```
**Returns:**

Promise&lt;boolean&gt;
